# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/tygrys/devel/OpenTxMFiR/opentxs/build
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//Boost atomic library (debug)
Boost_ATOMIC_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_atomic.so

//Boost atomic library (release)
Boost_ATOMIC_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_atomic.so

//Boost chrono library (debug)
Boost_CHRONO_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_chrono.so

//Boost chrono library (release)
Boost_CHRONO_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_chrono.so

//Boost container library (debug)
Boost_CONTAINER_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_container.so

//Boost container library (release)
Boost_CONTAINER_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_container.so

//Boost date_time library (debug)
Boost_DATE_TIME_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_date_time.so

//Boost date_time library (release)
Boost_DATE_TIME_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_date_time.so

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Boost.
Boost_DIR:PATH=Boost_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Boost filesystem library (debug)
Boost_FILESYSTEM_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_filesystem.so

//Boost filesystem library (release)
Boost_FILESYSTEM_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_filesystem.so

//Path to a file.
Boost_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Boost iostreams library (debug)
Boost_IOSTREAMS_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_iostreams.so

//Boost iostreams library (release)
Boost_IOSTREAMS_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_iostreams.so

//Boost json library (debug)
Boost_JSON_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_json.so

//Boost json library (release)
Boost_JSON_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_json.so

//Boost library directory DEBUG
Boost_LIBRARY_DIR_DEBUG:PATH=/usr/lib64

//Boost library directory RELEASE
Boost_LIBRARY_DIR_RELEASE:PATH=/usr/lib64

Boost_PROGRAM_OPTIONS_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_program_options.so

//Boost program_options library (release)
Boost_PROGRAM_OPTIONS_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_program_options.so

//Boost regex library (debug)

//Boost regex library (release)

//Boost stacktrace_basic library (release)

//Boost system library (release)

Boost_THREAD_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libboost_thread.so

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel.
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cc

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib64)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib64

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/usr/local

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//Read-only single-machine data (etc)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=etc

CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ld

CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ninja-build

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_STRIP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/strip

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Enable to build Debian packages
CPACK_BINARY_DEB:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build FreeBSD packages
CPACK_BINARY_FREEBSD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build IFW packages
CPACK_BINARY_IFW:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build NSIS packages
CPACK_BINARY_NSIS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build RPM packages
CPACK_BINARY_RPM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build STGZ packages
CPACK_BINARY_STGZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TBZ2 packages
CPACK_BINARY_TBZ2:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build TGZ packages
CPACK_BINARY_TGZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TXZ packages
CPACK_BINARY_TXZ:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build TZ packages
CPACK_BINARY_TZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build RPM source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_RPM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable to build TBZ2 source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TBZ2:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TGZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TGZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TXZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TXZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build TZ source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_TZ:BOOL=ON

//Enable to build ZIP source packages
CPACK_SOURCE_ZIP:BOOL=OFF

GIT:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/git

//Path to a library.
LIB_ANDROID_LOG:FILEPATH=LIB_ANDROID_LOG-NOTFOUND

LIB_RT:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/librt.a

LMDB_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Path to a library.
LMDB_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/liblmdb.so

//Path to a library.
OPENSSL_CRYPTO_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libcrypto.so

//Path to a file.
OPENSSL_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Path to a library.
OPENSSL_SSL_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libssl.so

//Build the unit tests.
OPENTXS_BUILD_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//Treat compiler warnings as errors.
OPENTXS_PEDANTIC_BUILD:BOOL=OFF

//Embed submodule version of secp256k1 instead of linking to external
// library
OT_BUNDLED_SECP256K1:BOOL=ON

//Enable Lucre support
OT_CASH_USING_LUCRE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable ed25519 key support
OT_CRYPTO_SUPPORTED_KEY_ED25519:BOOL=ON

//Enable RSA key support
OT_CRYPTO_SUPPORTED_KEY_RSA:BOOL=OFF

//Enable secp256k1 key support
OT_CRYPTO_SUPPORTED_KEY_SECP256K1:BOOL=ON

//Use libsecp256k1 crypto library
OT_CRYPTO_USING_LIBSECP256K1:BOOL=ON

//Use OpenSSL crypto library
OT_CRYPTO_USING_OPENSSL:BOOL=ON

//Enable packetcrypt validation library
OT_CRYPTO_USING_PACKETCRYPT:BOOL=OFF

//Enable OpenDHT support
OT_DHT:BOOL=OFF

//Build RPC server
OT_ENABLE_RPC:BOOL=OFF

//Install dependent libraries along with libopentxs
OT_INSTALL_LIBRARY_DEPENDENCIES:BOOL=OFF

//Enable include-what-you-use static analysis
OT_IWYU:BOOL=OFF

//Output Lucre debug info
OT_LUCRE_DEBUG:BOOL=OFF

//Assume OpenSSL library is LibreSSL
OT_OPENSSL_FLAVOR_LIBRESSL:BOOL=OFF

//Use precompiled headers
OT_PCH:BOOL=ON

//Use chaiscript
OT_SCRIPT_USING_CHAI:BOOL=ON

//Link against static version of dependencies
OT_STATIC_DEPENDENCIES:BOOL=OFF

//Enable filesystem backend for storage
OT_STORAGE_FS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable LMDB backend for storage
OT_STORAGE_LMDB:BOOL=ON

//Enable sqlite backend for storage
OT_STORAGE_SQLITE:BOOL=OFF

//Assume dependencies are managed by vcpkg
OT_USE_VCPKG_TARGETS:BOOL=OFF

//Use Valgrind annotations.
OT_VALGRIND:BOOL=OFF

//Enable blockchain client support
OT_WITH_BLOCKCHAIN:BOOL=ON

//Enable Qt QML model support for ui classes
OT_WITH_QML:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Qt model support for ui classes
OT_WITH_QT:BOOL=OFF

//Arguments to supply to pkg-config
PKG_CONFIG_ARGN:STRING=

//pkg-config executable
PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/pkg-config

//Path to a file.
Protobuf_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Path to a library.
Protobuf_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libprotobuf.so

//Path to a library.
Protobuf_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libprotobuf.so

//Path to a library.
Protobuf_LITE_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libprotobuf-lite.so

//Path to a library.
Protobuf_LITE_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libprotobuf-lite.so

//The Google Protocol Buffers Compiler
Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/protoc

//Path to a library.
Protobuf_PROTOC_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libprotoc.so

//Path to a library.
Protobuf_PROTOC_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libprotoc.so

//Build secp256k1's benchmarks
SECP256K1_BUILD_BENCH:BOOL=OFF

//Build secp256k1's unit tests
SECP256K1_BUILD_TEST:BOOL=OFF

//Precision bits to tune the precomputed table size for signing.
SECP256K1_ECMULT_GEN_PRECISION:STRING=4

//Precompute libsecp256k1's elliptic curve multiplication tables
SECP256K1_ECMULT_STATIC_PRECOMPUTATION:BOOL=OFF

//Window size for ecmult precomputation for verification, specified
// as integer in range [2..24].
SECP256K1_ECMULT_WINDOW_SIZE:STRING=15

//Enable branch coverage
SECP256K1_ENABLE_BRANCH_COVERAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable coverage
SECP256K1_ENABLE_COVERAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable external default callbacks
SECP256K1_ENABLE_EXTERNAL_DEFAULT_CALLBACKS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the Java Native Interface binding
SECP256K1_ENABLE_JNI:BOOL=OFF

//Build libsecp256k1's ECDH module
SECP256K1_ENABLE_MODULE_ECDH:BOOL=ON

//Build libsecp256k1's Extrakeys module
SECP256K1_ENABLE_MODULE_EXTRAKEYS:BOOL=OFF

//Build libsecp256k1's MULTISET module
SECP256K1_ENABLE_MODULE_MULTISET:BOOL=OFF

//Build libsecp256k1's recovery module
SECP256K1_ENABLE_MODULE_RECOVERY:BOOL=ON

//Build libsecp256k1's Schnorr module
SECP256K1_ENABLE_MODULE_SCHNORR:BOOL=ON

//Build libsecp256k1's Schnorrsig module
SECP256K1_ENABLE_MODULE_SCHNORRSIG:BOOL=OFF

//Test-only override of the (autodetected by the C code) "widemul"
// setting (can be int64 or int128)
SECP256K1_TEST_OVERRIDE_WIDE_MULTIPLY:STRING=

//Use assembly
SECP256K1_USE_ASM:BOOL=ON

//Path to a file.
SODIUM_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Path to a library.
SODIUM_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libsodium.so

//Path to a file.
ZLIB_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Path to a library.
ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
ZLIB_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libz.so

//Path to a file.
ZMQ_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Path to a library.
ZMQ_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libzmq.so

opentxs_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/tygrys/devel/OpenTxMFiR/opentxs/build

//Value Computed by CMake
opentxs_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
opentxs_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/tygrys/devel/OpenTxMFiR/opentxs

pkgcfg_lib_PC_Sodium_sodium:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libsodium.so

//Path to a library.
pkgcfg_lib_PC_ZeroMQ_zmq:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libzmq.so

pkgcfg_lib__OPENSSL_crypto:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libcrypto.so

//Path to a library.
pkgcfg_lib__OPENSSL_ssl:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libssl.so

CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=2
